name: systeme.io

evidence.claim: Systeme.io offers a public API that enables developers to perform contact, subscription, and newsletter operations.
The integration method utilizes an API key found in the Systeme.io workspace settings.
Search citation: Systeme.io Integration API ❇️ Connect Systeme.io to Anything!

one_liner: Systeme.io is an all-in-one marketing platform that integrates funnel building, email marketing, course hosting, and automation tools.
api_notes: The API provides access to core contact management, subscription operations, and newsletter management, as well as the ability to trigger internal automations.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed using an API key managed within the user's workspace settings.
access_notes: The public API feature is available to users; developers can access API keys through the systeme.io workspace settings.
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community MCP server was identified in the documentation or search results.
